MINI MINUTES:
2:07 p.m. Appearances for this Order of Examination are as follows:
Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq. 801 Fillmore, #22, San Francisco, CA 94117 (922-5939) appearing forattorney THOMAS CAUDILL who represents Plaintiff/Judgment Creditor PATELCO CREDIT UNION, etc.
Judgment Debtor SHARIAN D. LOFTIS in propria persona

Ms. Loftis was sworn. Both parties escorted to Department 610 where an examination of the judgment debtor was conducted. Both parties returned at 2:50 p.m. wherein an agreement was made to continue this matter to MAY 10, 2004 AT 2:00 p.m.
